prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第3章　朝を持ち帰る / 第1話　朝食を持って帰る. Scene focus: 第2節　店先の横取り役 / セラパート. Summary: ベーカリーの店先では、通勤客を装った男が立て看板を押し、もう一人が自転車を倒す角度を測っていた。標的が紙袋とコーヒーで両手を塞がれた瞬間に足を止めさせ、反射的に荷物をかばわせる… Key beats: ベーカリーの店先では、通勤客を装った男が立て看板を押し、もう一人が自転車を倒す角度を測っていた。標的が紙袋とコーヒーで両手を塞がれた瞬間に足を止めさせ、反射的に荷物をかばわせる。その一拍で脇の路地へ引き込み、待機車両へ押し込む算段だった。焼きたての匂いがする場所でやる仕事としては、かなり下品である。 セラは店の庇の影で、紙袋の揺れと相手の視線の高さを一度に見た。メイド風ジョギングウェアのジャケット裾が風に鳴るより先に、彼女のほうが動く。 「朝食を人質にする趣味は感心しません」 看板役の手首へ指先を差し込み、押す力の向きだけを変える。看板は店側へは倒れず、男の膝へ戻った。自転車役が反射的に車体を支えようとした瞬間、セラの踵がスタンドを跳ね上げ、バランスを逆に崩す。前へ出た肩へ短く一撃。路地奥で待っていた回収役には、紙袋の陰で見えない角度から喉の下を打ち、壁際へ折りたたむ。三人とも、遠目には朝の路地で躓いただけにしか見えない。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sera-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same bakery incident as scene-003-001-001-sato. Keep the same bakery exterior, same paper bag continuity, and same morning neighborhood light as the paired image. Sato must remain an unaware background figure near the storefront and must not look toward Sera or the incident. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Create a covert storefront action image with Sera dominant outside the bakery, stopping a snatch setup around a display board, curbside bicycle, or side lane where abductors are trying to make Sato drop breakfast and drag him away. Keep Sato smaller in the background leaving the shop and unaware.
